title: 5 tools we use to ship AI in 30 days
copy:
5 tools we actually use to ship AI agents in 30 days. Not what we 'recommend'. What we used this week.

1. Claude Code - the IDE
2. N8N - workflow glue
3. OpenClaw - for the harder agent runs
4. Postiz - social scheduler we sell through
5. Telegram - the universal chat interface

If you're an innovation lead at an SME and your team is stuck at 'we built a chatbot pilot, then nothing' - these five plus 30 days is the unlock.

We're running a workshop on April 14 walking through how this stack ships an agent end-to-end. Comment 'workshop' for the link.
cta: Comment 'workshop' for the April 14 sign-up link
